product.name: Listen Library
product.tagline: A calm library system for ebooks and audiobooks, built for focused reading and listening.

hero.headline: Listen Library
hero.subhead: A luxury-grade personal library for ebooks, audiobooks, bundles, and structured collections.

summary: Listen Library is a multi-platform storefront and personal library system for ebooks and audiobooks. It pairs a clean browsing experience with rich organization tools like collections, tags, and smart rules, plus a built-in player and import tools for DRM-free files.
audience: Readers and listeners who want one place to manage digital books
Collectors who need structure: collections, tags, smart shelves
People migrating from other platforms with metadata-only imports
coreProblems: Digital libraries become scattered across apps and devices
Audiobook progress and organization are hard to maintain
Switching platforms makes history and wishlists hard to keep

features.title: Unified library
features.summary: Storefront purchases and imported files live together with consistent metadata and progress.

features.title: Collections and smart shelves
features.summary: Organize with folders, tags, and rules-based collections that update automatically.

features.title: Audiobook player
features.summary: In-browser playback with progress sync and queue support for context sessions.

features.title: Bundles and credits
features.summary: Bundle tiers and credit-based entitlement flows are built in from day one.

features.title: Switch Assistant
features.summary: Metadata-only CSV imports plus DRM-free file import for a clean migration path.

workflows.title: Discover and collect
workflows.summary: Browse releases, bundles, and free classics, then add to your personal library.

workflows.title: Organize with intent
workflows.summary: Create collections and tags, and let smart rules keep them current.

workflows.title: Context listening
workflows.summary: Generate time-based queues and pick up where you left off.

proofPoints.label: Platforms
proofPoints.note: Web app plus Expo mobile clients in the repo.

proofPoints.label: Library model
proofPoints.note: Supports purchases, bundles, and DRM-free imports.

faq.question: Is this live in app stores?
faq.answer: Not yet. The repository contains the web app, mobile app, and API setup but no store listings are referenced.

faq.question: Does it handle DRM?
faq.answer: The current focus is DRM-free delivery, with a license abstraction for future DRM support.

faq.question: Can I import from other services?
faq.answer: Yes, via metadata-only CSV import and DRM-free file upload.

catalog.title: Listen Library
catalog.blurb: A premium digital library system that blends storefront discovery with structured personal collections.

repoArchetypeReasoning: Repo contains Next.js web app, Expo mobile app, and Fastify API.
Focus is a productized library/storefront for ebooks and audiobooks.
assumptions: No public support or privacy URLs were found, so placeholders are left blank.
No screenshots were available, so the product icon is used as a visual anchor.
missingButUsefulAssets: Product screenshots for web browse/library screens
